headline: BlackRock Expands iBonds ETFs And Launches Leveraged Loan Fund As Shares Lag
summary: BlackRock has announced a broad expansion of its iBonds ETF platform across Treasuries, TIPS, corporates, high yield, and municipal bonds. The company is also launching the iShares Broad USD Floating Rate Loan ETF, its first index based ETF providing access to U.S. leveraged loans. These launches highlight new ways for investors to approach bond laddering and gain index based access to the leveraged loan market. BlackRock, trading on the NYSE under ticker NYSE:BLK, is rolling out these...
